hints.to eat: 'To eat' is 'edere/esse' — here 'est' is from 'sum' (to be)

hints.present subjunctive: Present subjunctive would be 'sit' — 'est' is indicative

hints.edo, esse, edi, esum: These are the parts of 'edo' (to eat)
hints.eo, ire, ii, itum: These are the parts of 'eo' (to go)
hints.fio, fieri, factus sum, —: These are the parts of 'fio' (to become)

hints.genitive: Genitive would be 'calicis' — 'calix' is nominative after 'est'
hints.vocative: Vocative would be used for address — this is a declarative statement

hints.1st declension: 1st declension has genitive in -ae — 'calicis' ends in -is
hints.2nd declension: 2nd declension has genitive in -i — 'calicis' ends in -is
hints.4th declension: 4th declension has genitive in -us — 'calicis' ends in -is

hints.accusative: 'Testamentum' looks the same in accusative, but here it is in apposition to 'calix' (nominative)

hints.1st declension: 1st declension has genitive in -ae — 'testamenti' ends in -i
hints.3rd declension: 3rd declension has genitive in -is — 'testamenti' ends in -i
hints.4th declension: 4th declension has genitive in -us — 'testamenti' ends in -i

hints.nominative: Nominative would be 'sanguis' — 'sanguine' with -e ending is ablative
hints.accusative: Accusative would be 'sanguinem' — 'sanguine' is ablative after 'in'

hints.1st declension: 1st declension has genitive in -ae — 'sanguinis' ends in -is
hints.2nd declension: 2nd declension has genitive in -i — 'sanguinis' ends in -is
hints.4th declension: 4th declension has genitive in -us — 'sanguinis' ends in -is

steps.prompt: What does 'novum' modify and what is its case?

hints.accusative neuter, modifying 'calicem': 'Calix' is masculine — 'novum' (neuter) cannot modify it; it agrees with 'testamentum'
hints.ablative neuter, modifying 'sanguine': 'Sanguis' is masculine — 'novum' (neuter) cannot modify it; 'sanguine' would need 'novo'
hints.genitive, modifying 'calicis': Genitive would be 'novi' — 'novum' is nominative neuter agreeing with 'testamentum'

translation: This cup is the new covenant in my blood
